evidence.correctness_and_freshness: xendit-python==0.2.0 pinned is suspect; the SDK import paths (xendit.apis.PaymentRequestApi, xendit.payment_request.model.*) appear fabricated/inconsistent — xendit.set_api_key + xendit.ApiClient() coexisting is contradictory. No version date claimed. Long-tail: internally inconsistent SDK usage.
evidence.executability: Pydantic v2 used (pydantic==2.5.0) but Field(regex=...) is invalid in v2 (must be 'pattern'), causing ImportError/validation error at startup. pydantic_settings imported but not in requirements. Frontend code block is truncated mid-CSS (unterminated fence), so extractor will fail to close the block. Multiple non-obvious fixes required.
evidence.completeness: (a) key acquisition present; (b) install commands present; (c) env template present; (d) backend code present; (e) frontend code present but TRUNCATED mid-file; (f) no explicit test command/section. Truncation and missing test cmd are critical gaps.
evidence.citation_anchoring: References like [1][2][10] are used throughout but no actual URLs or citation list is shown (truncated). developer.xendit.co not cited. Effectively no anchored official docs URLs.

rubric_notes: Playbook appears truncated at end of CSS block; pydantic v2 regex= is a hard runtime error; SDK API surface looks fabricated/inconsistent.
